description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to update apt and install Docker on the runner. Define two jobs, build_for_pg10 and build_for_pg96, both using the default stage. The build_for_pg10 job executes "docker build --build-arg PG_SERVER_VERSION=10 -t postgresmen/postgres-with-stuff:p10 ." and the build_for_pg96 job executes "docker build --build-arg PG_SERVER_VERSION=9.6 -t postgresmen/postgres-with-stuff:pg9.6 ." No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are specified.
